---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Deck
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem would this solve?**
Describe the situation you're in and what's currently annoying or missing — not just the feature
itself. (E.g. "I can't tell which settings tier a value came from without opening three files.")

**What's your proposed solution?**
What would you want Deck to do instead?

**Have you checked `project_docs/roadmap.md`?**
Some ideas are already planned, in progress, or explicitly deferred with reasoning. If your idea
overlaps with something there, link it and add any new context you have — that's more useful than
a duplicate.

**Who is this for?**
Is this aimed at non-technical users, power users, or both? Deck's design principle is "simple by
default, advanced on demand" — knowing the audience helps figure out where a new control should
live.

**Anything else?**
Mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
